author_identification.canonical_name_ar: أبو بكر عبد الله بن محمد بن عبيد بن سفيان بن قيس البغدادي الأموي القرشي
author_identification.scholarly_standing: Prominent hadith scholar and author of numerous works on ethics, spirituality, and hadith.

scholarly_context.tradition_position: Part of the broader tradition of compiling hadith collections focusing on specific themes, such as aging and piety.
scholarly_context.historical_significance: Contributes to the ethical and spiritual literature of the Islamic tradition, reflecting on the value of a long life and good deeds.
scholarly_context.muhaqiq_reputation: Dr. Najm Abdullah Khalf is a known scholar with contributions to hadith and Islamic literature.
